home.aboutDesc: We are a community-driven foundation dedicated to creating lasting change through education, healthcare, and sustainable development programs across East Africa.
home.whatWeDoEducationDesc: Providing quality education and scholarships to underserved communities, empowering the next generation of leaders.
home.whatWeDoHealthcareDesc: Improving access to healthcare services, maternal care, and disease prevention programs across rural areas.
home.whatWeDoCommunityDesc: Building sustainable livelihoods through microfinance, skills training, and agricultural innovation programs.
home.whatWeDoEnvironmentDesc: Protecting natural resources and promoting sustainable practices for future generations through community-led initiatives.
home.impactDesc: Stories of transformation from the communities we serve.
home.historyDesc: Founded with a vision to uplift underserved communities across East Africa, our organization has grown from a small grassroots initiative into a multi-program foundation impacting thousands of lives. Through decades of dedication, partnership, and community-driven action, we have built lasting programs in education, healthcare, and sustainable development that continue to create ripple effects of positive change.
home.ctaDesc: Every action counts. Whether you donate, volunteer, or partner with us, you become part of the solution.
home.ctaDonateDesc: Your contribution directly funds programs that change lives.
home.ctaVolunteerDesc: Share your skills and time to make a meaningful difference.
home.ctaPartnerDesc: Collaborate with us to scale impact across communities.

meta.title: Who We Are
meta.description: Learn about our mission, vision, and the values that drive our work.

whoWeAre.heading: Who We Are
whoWeAre.subheading: A community-driven foundation dedicated to empowering underserved communities through sustainable development, education, and healthcare.
whoWeAre.storyHeading: From a Vision to a Movement
whoWeAre.storyP1: Founded with a simple yet powerful belief — that every community deserves the opportunity to thrive — we began our journey in the heart of East Africa. What started as a small group of passionate individuals has grown into a movement touching thousands of lives.
whoWeAre.storyP2: Over the years, we have partnered with local communities, governments, and international organizations to deliver programs that create lasting change. From building schools to training healthcare workers, every initiative is rooted in the belief that sustainable development begins with empowered people.
whoWeAre.storyP3: Today, we continue to expand our reach, driven by the same passion that inspired our founding — and the communities we serve remain at the heart of everything we do.
whoWeAre.missionText: To empower marginalized communities through education, healthcare, and sustainable development programs that foster self-reliance, dignity, and long-term prosperity for all.
whoWeAre.visionText: A world where every community has equitable access to education, healthcare, and economic opportunity — where no one is left behind and every person can reach their full potential.
whoWeAre.valueCompassionDesc: We lead with empathy and genuine care for the communities we serve.
whoWeAre.valueIntegrityDesc: Transparency and accountability in every action, every decision.
whoWeAre.valueCommunityDesc: We believe in the power of collective action and local ownership.
whoWeAre.valueInnovationDesc: Creative, sustainable solutions tailored to each community's needs.
whoWeAre.ctaDesc: Join us in our mission to create lasting change. Every contribution matters.

meta.title: Our History
meta.description: The story of Gloford Foundation, from its founding to its current impact.

history.heading: Our History
history.subheading: From a single mobile clinic in Jinja to a regional organization serving 14 districts — this is the story of community-driven growth.
history.lookingForwardDesc: As we enter our next chapter, we remain committed to our founding principles while embracing innovation. Our goal: reach more communities and deepen our impact.
history.timeline0Text: Founded by Dr. Isaac Mukasa in Jinja district. The first program was a mobile reproductive health clinic visiting five villages on a rotating weekly schedule.
history.timeline1Text: We launched our first youth mentorship cohort. Twelve young people completed a six-month program combining life skills, financial literacy, and vocational training.
history.timeline2Text: Community leaders in Soroti district invited us to replicate our health outreach model. We established our second field office and hired 15 local staff.
history.timeline3Text: We launched our community radio station, broadcasting in six local languages. Listenership reached 500,000 within the first year.
history.timeline4Text: We distributed drought-resistant seed varieties, built rainwater harvesting systems, and established early-warning networks in 200 farming communities.
history.timeline5Text: Our annual beneficiary count exceeded 80,000, and our team had grown to 60 staff members across ten districts.
history.timeline6Text: Our mobile clinics adapted to include COVID-19 screening and prevention education. Our youth program pivoted to digital skills training.
history.timeline7Text: We opened our Gulu field office, marking our entry into northern Uganda through a multi-year partnership with PEPFAR.
history.timeline8Text: Today we operate across 14 districts with four integrated programs. Our community radio reaches over 2 million listeners weekly.

meta.title: Our Approach
meta.description: Our community-driven methodology for sustainable development.

ourApproach.heading: Our Approach
ourApproach.heroDesc: We believe in sustainable, community-driven development. Our methodology is built on decades of experience and a commitment to measurable, lasting change.
ourApproach.stepAssessDesc: We begin by deeply understanding community needs through participatory research, listening sessions, and data-driven analysis to identify the most impactful areas for intervention.
ourApproach.stepDesignDesc: Working hand-in-hand with community members, we co-design programs that are culturally relevant, locally owned, and built to last beyond our direct involvement.
ourApproach.stepImplementDesc: With trained local teams and strong partnerships, we execute programs with precision, adapting in real-time to ensure maximum effectiveness and community engagement.
ourApproach.stepEvaluateDesc: Rigorous monitoring and evaluation allow us to measure impact, share findings transparently, and continuously improve our approach for future programs.
ourApproach.principleCommunityDesc: Every decision starts and ends with the people we serve. We prioritize dignity, agency, and local leadership in all our work.
ourApproach.principlePartnershipDesc: We build lasting partnerships with local organizations, governments, and international bodies to amplify impact.
ourApproach.principleAccountabilityDesc: We hold ourselves to the highest standards of financial stewardship and open reporting to our donors and communities.
ourApproach.principleInnovationDesc: We embrace evidence-based innovation and remain flexible, adapting our strategies as contexts evolve.
ourApproach.ctaHeading: Ready to Make an Impact Together?
ourApproach.ctaDesc: Whether you want to donate, volunteer, or partner with us, there are many ways to join our mission.

meta.title: Internship Program
meta.description: Start your career in community development with a Gloford internship.

internships.heading: Internship Program
internships.heroDesc: Our internships are designed for emerging professionals who want real exposure to community development work. Interns work alongside experienced staff on real projects — not make-work assignments.
internships.trackFieldDesc: Work directly with one of our four programs in a field setting. Ideal for public health, agriculture, social work, or development studies.
internships.trackCommsDesc: Support our radio station, digital content, photography, and storytelling. Great for journalism, media, and communications students.
internships.trackResearchDesc: Assist with data collection, analysis, and report writing. Suited for statistics, social sciences, or public policy.
internships.trackOpsDesc: Support headquarters functions including procurement, HR, and financial reporting.
internships.noOpeningsDesc: We accept applications on a rolling basis. Send your CV and motivation letter to internships@gloford.org
internships.ctaDesc: Internships typically last 3-6 months and begin with a two-week orientation. A small stipend and transport allowance are provided.

meta.title: Partner With Us
meta.description: Collaborate with us to scale community impact and sustainable development.

partnerWithUs.heading: Partner With Us
partnerWithUs.heroDesc: We welcome partnerships with donors, NGOs, institutions, governments, and private sector actors who share our values. Together, we can multiply our impact across communities.
partnerWithUs.typeFundingDesc: Support our programs through grants, sponsorships, or co-funding. We offer full transparency, regular reporting, and independent audits.
partnerWithUs.typeImplementationDesc: Co-deliver programs in areas of shared expertise. We bring deep community access and local knowledge.
partnerWithUs.typeTechnicalDesc: Share specialized knowledge in areas like agricultural technology, digital health, media production, or organizational development.
partnerWithUs.typeStrategicDesc: Long-term strategic alliances that align institutional missions for sustained community impact.
partnerWithUs.inquiryDesc: Tell us about your organization and how you'd like to collaborate.
partnerWithUs.formAboutOrgPlaceholder: Brief description of your organization, mission, and areas of work...
partnerWithUs.formWhyPartnerPlaceholder: Describe the partnership you envision — what you hope to achieve together, areas of mutual interest, and how this aligns with your organization's goals...
partnerWithUs.formError: Failed to submit inquiry. Please try again.
partnerWithUs.successDesc: Thank you for your interest in partnering with us. Our partnerships team will review your inquiry and respond within 5 business days.

terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.subheading: Please read these terms carefully before using our website or services.
terms.acceptanceText: By accessing or using the Gloford website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website or services.
terms.useText: You may use our website for lawful purposes only. You agree not to use the site in any way that could damage, disable, or impair it, or interfere with any other party's use. You must not attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the website, server, or database connected to the site.
terms.ipText: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, graphics, and software, is the property of Gloford or its content suppliers and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written consent.
terms.donationsText: All donations made through our website are voluntary and non-refundable unless otherwise stated. Gloford will use donated funds in accordance with its charitable mission. Donation receipts will be provided for tax-deductible contributions where applicable.
terms.disclaimerText: Our website and services are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. Gloford makes no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding the accuracy, reliability, or availability of the website or its content.
terms.liabilityText: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Gloford shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the website or services, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.
terms.changesText: We reserve the right to update these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with the revised date. Your continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at info@gloford.org or through our contact page.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.subheading: We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy.
privacy.collectionText: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when you make a donation, subscribe to our newsletter, fill out a contact form, or register for an event. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and payment information.
privacy.useText: We use your personal information to process donations, send newsletters and updates, respond to inquiries, manage event registrations, improve our website and services, and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.sharingText: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our website and processing payments, provided they agree to keep your information confidential.
privacy.cookiesText: Our website uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and understand where our visitors come from. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.
privacy.securityText: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information at any time. You may also opt out of receiving marketing communications by using the unsubscribe link in our emails or by contacting us directly.
privacy.childrenText: Our website is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us so we can remove it.
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@gloford.org or through our contact page.
